name: Mighty Slap
short_description: Mighty Slap is a Player vs Player Third person fighting and Turn Based slapping game. Time your slap with a time based bonus multiplier to land a powerful slap to your opponent. First player to knock out the opponent wins.
detailed_description:
Mighty Slap is a Player vs Player Third Person Fighting and Turn Based slapping game.
Fight your opponent to weaken their strength before you enter the slapping competition. Time your slap with a time based bonus multiplier to land a powerful slap to your opponent. First player to knock out the opponent wins.



Control your character to dodge and hit the opponent. Weaken the enemy health before you enter the ring. Then there's only one control which is to time your slap.
There's a set of characters to choose from which are meant solely for visual purpose and one character does not provide any advantage over the other is any way.
